origin.summary: User asked to review blueprint/project-structure.md and blueprint/nextcloud-api-model.md, then create a core architect for future smaller architects without creating project modules.

events.note: Created parent pending architecture record from the two blueprint files.
Linked the MVP child architects that should be resolved before post-MVP work.
Resolved build foundation and blocked the next two MVP children on missing user-created module directories.
Resolved the first three MVP child architects after the user created the needed lib and tool modules.
Resolved the fourth MVP child architect: non-admin Nextcloud user client.
Resolved the fifth MVP child architect: framework-neutral MCP tool API/runtime.
Created focused post-MVP child architects for security hardening, deferred capabilities, admin CLI, and packaging/config/docs; marked resolved admin client/tools as already covered.
Resolved after every parent checklist item and decision to revisit was completed and focused post-MVP child architects were created.
